case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS KOHLER, BILL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $166.98 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT KOHLER, BILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
